_schema._doc: Optional per-match stats consumed by scripts/rank_teams.py. Keys mirror live_state.json ('Team A vs Team B'). All fields optional; omit or null = not provided (graceful). DO NOT invent values — fill only from real box scores.
_schema.xg: [xg_a, xg_b] floats (same orientation as key) — primary 'deserved-result' signal in the form re-rating
_schema.shots: [shots_a, shots_b] ints — territorial signal (sharper of the two) in the form re-rating
_schema.possession: [pct_a, pct_b] ints ~100 — territorial signal (lower weight; noisier) in the form re-rating
_schema.scorers: [{player, team, goals(optional, default 1)}] — one entry per scorer; omit own goals
